calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Apr-01-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Elder Abuse TRO hearing this day.

Plaintiff: Maria Del Carmen Higareda was present in pro per; assisted with English/Spanish translation by Francisca Oropeza. Ms. Oropeza was sworn as to the English/Spanish translation. Akeczalli Ramirez (witness) for the Plaintiff.

Defendant: Amarantha Voss was present in pro per.

Parties were sworn and examined.

The Court hears testimony, receives evidence, and after hearing the evidence presented the Plaintiff's order is Granted as follows: Defendant shall stay at least 50 yards away from the protected persons: Maria Del Carmen Higareda and Xikonaui Rodriquez, and *the Residence: *as long as the parties reside at the same residence at 3323 23rd Street, San Francisco, a 2 yard stay away is in effect.

Expires: March 31, 2011.

Order signed.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue Kaplan. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Jackie Alameda. Bailiff: T. Jackson.
